name: Lithium Royalty Corp.
description: Lithium Royalty Corp. (TSX: LIRC) is a Canada-based, lithium-focused royalty company that maintains a diversified portfolio of royalties on mineral properties globally. The company invests in lithium extraction projects to support the electrification and decarbonization of the global economy. By securing revenue royalties from various mining operations, Lithium Royalty Corp. provides investors with exposure to the lithium supply chain while mitigating operational risks. Headquartered in Toronto, the company plays a strategic role in the critical minerals sector, facilitating the development of essential raw materials required for the growing electric vehicle and renewable energy industries.
